auth.heading: Sign in with Spotify and explore lyrics in real time
auth.subtitle: Detect the track playing on Spotify, follow LRCLIB synced lyrics, and analyze Japanese lines in the right-hand panel.
auth.featureSecureLogin: Secure client login with OAuth 2.0 PKCE
auth.featureAnalysis: Romaji and Turkish analysis via the GitHub Models API

player.noActiveTrack: No active track found in the Spotify player.

lyrics.title: Karaoke view
lyrics.syncedTooltip: Synced lyrics: time-aligned with the song, advances automatically.
lyrics.plainTooltip: Plain lyrics: no timing data, does not advance automatically.
lyrics.filterOnTooltip: Filter on: only saved lines are shown. Click to see all.
lyrics.savedCountTooltip: {{count}} lines have saved analyses. Click to see only those.
lyrics.manualHint: If the lyrics are wrong or none were found, you can paste your own here.
lyrics.manualPlaceholder: Paste the lyrics here, line by line...
lyrics.manualSavedNote: Entered text is saved in your browser and reused when the same track is opened again.
lyrics.empty: No lyrics to show for the current track yet. You can use the manual lyrics field.

badge.infoTooltip: This line has no Japanese characters; it's shown for reference and won't be analyzed.
badge.savedTooltip: Analysis saved — opens instantly when clicked.
badge.readyTooltip: This line is ready to analyze — click to analyze it.

analysis.title: Line analysis
analysis.fromCacheTooltip: This analysis was loaded from storage — opened instantly.
analysis.freshTooltip: This analysis was just generated and saved.
analysis.empty: Click one of the lines on the left to see its analysis.
analysis.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during analysis.
analysis.romajiInfo: The Latin-script reading of the Japanese line.
analysis.translationInfo: The line's Turkish meaning or short translation, based on context.
analysis.noWords: The model didn't return any word cards.

kanji.characterInfo: The character itself if kanji; the relevant spelling if kana.
kanji.radicalInfo: The base part of the character that helps carry its meaning.
kanji.onyomiInfo: The Chinese-derived reading of the kanji.
kanji.kunyomiInfo: The native Japanese reading of the kanji.
kanji.explanationInfo: A short note on the meaning of the character or word.
